lessons.title: A New King Arose

verse.hebrew: וַיָּקָם מֶלֶךְ־חָדָשׁ עַל־מִצְרָיִם אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יָדַע אֶת־יוֹסֵף
verse.translit: va-yakom melech-chadash al-Mitzrayim asher lo-yada et-Yosef

lessons.gloss: And a new king arose over Egypt who did not know Joseph.
lessons.focus: Introduce מֶלֶךְ (king), a high-frequency word. Introduce חָדָשׁ (new). Reinforce ק־ו־מ (to rise) and י־ד־ע (to know).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 8 aloud with minimal support.

lessons.title: The Midwives Feared God

verse.hebrew: וַתִּירֶאןָ הַמְיַלְּדֹת אֶת־הָאֱלֹהִים וְלֹא עָשׂוּ כַּאֲשֶׁר דִּבֶּר אֲלֵיהֶן מֶלֶךְ מִצְרָיִם
verse.translit: va-tirena ha-meyaldot et-ha-Elohim ve-lo asu ka-asher diber aleihen melech Mitzrayim

lessons.gloss: And the midwives feared God and did not do as the king of Egypt had spoken to them.
lessons.focus: Introduce the 3fp imperfect va-tirena (they feared, feminine plural). Introduce the Piel participle feminine plural מְיַלְּדֹת (midwives, ones causing to bear). A rare and valuable 3fp exposure.

games.raw: Chant Along, Gender and Number Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child identifies a 3fp verb form.

lessons.title: She Hid Him Three Months

verse.hebrew: וַתַּהַר הָאִשָּׁה וַתֵּלֶד בֵּן וַתֵּרֶא אֹתוֹ כִּי־טוֹב הוּא וַתִּצְפְּנֵהוּ שְׁלֹשָׁה יְרָחִים
verse.translit: va-tahar ha-isha va-teled ben va-tere oto ki-tov hu va-titzpenehu shlosha yerachim

lessons.gloss: And the woman conceived and bore a son, and saw him that he was good, and hid him three months.
lessons.focus: Introduce צ־פ־נ (to hide). Introduce יֶרַח (month) as plural. Echo of Genesis 1 "saw it was good" language.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Intertextual Echo Highlight (the ki-tov formula from Genesis 1).

lessons.exit: Child notices the echo of Genesis 1 in the description of Moses.

lessons.title: From the Water I Drew Him

verse.hebrew: וַתִּקְרָא שְׁמוֹ מֹשֶׁה וַתֹּאמֶר כִּי מִן־הַמַּיִם מְשִׁיתִהוּ
verse.translit: va-tikra shmo Moshe va-tomer ki min-ha-mayim meshitihu

lessons.gloss: And she called his name Moses and said, For out of the water I drew him.
lessons.focus: Introduce the name pun: Moshe (drawn out) from מ־שׁ־ה (to draw out). The naming formula parallels Isaac and Abraham.

games.raw: Chant Along, Name Meaning Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child explains the pun between Moshe and the verb meaning "to draw out."

lessons.title: He Went Out to His Brethren

verse.hebrew: וַיְהִי בַּיָּמִים הָהֵם וַיִּגְדַּל מֹשֶׁה וַיֵּצֵא אֶל־אֶחָיו וַיַּרְא בְּסִבְלֹתָם
verse.translit: va-yehi ba-yamim ha-hem va-yigdal Moshe va-yetze el-echav va-yar be-sivlotam

lessons.gloss: And it came to pass in those days that Moses grew up and went out to his brethren and saw their burdens.
lessons.focus: Introduce the narrative frame va-yehi ba-yamim ha-hem (and it came to pass in those days). Reinforce ג־ד־ל, י־צ־א, ר־א־ה.

games.raw: Chant Along, Narrative Frame Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes va-yehi as a narrative opener.

lessons.title: He Fled to Midian

verse.hebrew: וַיִּבְרַח מֹשֶׁה מִפְּנֵי פַרְעֹה וַיֵּשֶׁב בְּאֶרֶץ־מִדְיָן
verse.translit: va-yivrach Moshe mi-pnei Par'oh va-yeshev be-eretz-Midyan

lessons.gloss: And Moses fled from before Pharaoh and dwelt in the land of Midian.
lessons.focus: Introduce ב־ר־ח (to flee). Introduce the idiom מִפְּנֵי (from before).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Preposition Builder (from-the-face-of).

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 15 with minimal support.

lessons.title: God Heard Their Groaning

verse.hebrew: וַיִּשְׁמַע אֱלֹהִים אֶת־נַאֲקָתָם וַיִּזְכֹּר אֱלֹהִים אֶת־בְּרִיתוֹ אֶת־אַבְרָהָם אֶת־יִצְחָק וְאֶת־יַעֲקֹב
verse.translit: va-yishma Elohim et-na'akatam va-yizkor Elohim et-berito et-Avraham et-Yitzchak ve-et-Ya'akov

lessons.gloss: And God heard their groaning, and God remembered his covenant with Abraham, with Isaac, and with Jacob.
lessons.focus: Introduce ש־מ־ע (to hear) and ז־כ־ר (to remember). Both are massively high-frequency and covenantally weighty. The covenant-remembering formula appears explicitly.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Covenant Vocabulary Review (berit highlighted).

lessons.exit: Child recites the covenant-remembering formula.

lessons.title: God Knew

verse.hebrew: וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים אֶת־בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל וַיֵּדַע אֱלֹהִים
verse.translit: va-yar Elohim et-bnei Yisrael va-yeda Elohim

lessons.gloss: And God saw the children of Israel, and God knew.
lessons.focus: Short, weighty verse. Reinforce ר־א־ה and י־ד־ע in 3ms vav-consecutive. Memorization target.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 25 from memory.

lessons.title: The Bush Burned with Fire

verse.hebrew: וְהִנֵּה הַסְּנֶה בֹּעֵר בָּאֵשׁ וְהַסְּנֶה אֵינֶנּוּ אֻכָּל
verse.translit: ve-hineh ha-sneh bo'er ba-esh ve-ha-sneh einenu ukkal

lessons.gloss: And behold, the bush burned with fire, and the bush was not consumed.
lessons.focus: Introduce ב־ע־ר (to burn). Introduce the negative existence particle אֵין with suffix (einenu, it is not). Introduce the Pual participle אֻכָּל (consumed, passive).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Existence Particle Match (yesh / ein), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child negates a yesh-statement with ein-plus-suffix.

lessons.title: Put Off Thy Shoes

verse.hebrew: שַׁל־נְעָלֶיךָ מֵעַל רַגְלֶיךָ כִּי הַמָּקוֹם אֲשֶׁר אַתָּה עוֹמֵד עָלָיו אַדְמַת־קֹדֶשׁ הוּא
verse.translit: shal-ne'alecha me-al raglecha ki ha-makom asher ata omed alav admat-kodesh hu

lessons.gloss: Put off your shoes from your feet, for the place on which you are standing is holy ground.
lessons.focus: Introduce נ־שׁ־ל (to draw off). Introduce the imperative plus 2ms suffix. Introduce the construct אַדְמַת־קֹדֶשׁ (ground of holiness). Reinforce ק־ד־שׁ as a weighty root.

roots.raw: נ־שׁ־ל (to draw off, remove), ע־מ־ד (to stand).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Construct Chain Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes the construct admat-kodesh and translates it.

lessons.title: I Have Surely Seen

verse.hebrew: רָאֹה רָאִיתִי אֶת־עֳנִי עַמִּי אֲשֶׁר בְּמִצְרָיִם
verse.translit: ra'oh ra'iti et-oni ami asher be-Mitzrayim

lessons.gloss: I have surely seen the affliction of my people who are in Egypt.
lessons.focus: Introduce the emphatic infinitive absolute plus perfect (ra'oh ra'iti, surely I have seen). Introduce עֹנִי (affliction) and עַם (people, my people).

roots.raw: ע־נ־ה (to afflict, answer — one of the polysemic roots).

games.raw: Chant Along, Emphatic Construction Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child forms an inf absolute plus perfect emphatic construction from a familiar root.

lessons.title: I Will Be with Thee

verse.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר כִּי־אֶהְיֶה עִמָּךְ
verse.translit: va-yomer ki-eheyeh imach

lessons.gloss: And he said, I will be with you.
lessons.focus: Short, weighty verse. Introduce the 1cs imperfect of ה־י־ה (eheyeh, I will be). Covenant-accompaniment formula.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 12 from memory in Hebrew.

lessons.title: I AM THAT I AM

verse.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר אֱלֹהִים אֶל־מֹשֶׁה אֶהְיֶה אֲשֶׁר אֶהְיֶה
verse.translit: va-yomer Elohim el-Moshe eheyeh asher eheyeh

lessons.gloss: And God said to Moses, I AM THAT I AM.
lessons.focus: The central divine self-identification. Explain the root connection: the Tetragrammaton יְהוָה is etymologically linked to this verb of being. For LDS families, note that this name is identified with Jehovah / premortal Christ. Parent companion material provides depth.

roots.raw: Reinforce ה־י־ה as the root of the divine name.

games.raw: Chant Along, Divine Name Highlight (the child sees YHVH and eheyeh glow together), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 14 from memory and explains the connection between eheyeh and YHVH.

lessons.title: The God of Your Fathers

verse.hebrew: יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי אֲבֹתֵיכֶם אֱלֹהֵי אַבְרָהָם אֱלֹהֵי יִצְחָק וֵאלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב שְׁלָחַנִי אֲלֵיכֶם זֶה־שְּׁמִי לְעֹלָם
verse.translit: YHVH Elohei avotechem Elohei Avraham Elohei Yitzchak v-Elohei Ya'akov shelachani aleichem zeh-shmi le-olam

lessons.gloss: The LORD, God of your fathers, God of Abraham, God of Isaac, and God of Jacob, has sent me to you. This is my name forever.
lessons.focus: Introduce אָב in construct plural (avot, avotechem). Introduce עוֹלָם (forever, age, world). A weighty covenant-name verse.

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites the Elohei Avraham / Elohei Yitzchak / Elohei Ya'akov formula.

lessons.title: What Is That in Thy Hand

verse.hebrew: וַיֹּאמֶר אֵלָיו יְהוָה מַה־זֶּה בְיָדֶךָ וַיֹּאמֶר מַטֶּה
verse.translit: va-yomer elav YHVH ma-zeh ve-yadecha va-yomer mateh

lessons.gloss: And the LORD said to him, What is that in your hand? And he said, A rod.
lessons.focus: Introduce the interrogative מַה (what). A short, memorable dialogue.

games.raw: Chant Along, Question Word Tap, Dialogue Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child asks and answers a simple mah-question in Hebrew.

lessons.title: I Am Slow of Speech

verse.hebrew: לֹא אִישׁ דְּבָרִים אָנֹכִי כִּי כְבַד־פֶּה וּכְבַד לָשׁוֹן אָנֹכִי
verse.translit: lo ish devarim anochi ki chvad-peh u-chvad lashon anochi

lessons.gloss: I am not a man of words, for I am heavy of mouth and heavy of tongue.
lessons.focus: Introduce the construct chvad-peh (heavy of mouth). Introduce לָשׁוֹן (tongue). Reinforce the emphatic pronoun anochi.

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 10 aloud with minimal support.

lessons.title: Thus Says the LORD

verse.hebrew: כֹּה אָמַר יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל שַׁלַּח אֶת־עַמִּי
verse.translit: koh amar YHVH Elohei Yisrael shalach et-ami

lessons.gloss: Thus says the LORD, God of Israel, Let my people go.
lessons.focus: Introduce the prophetic messenger formula koh amar YHVH. Introduce the Piel imperative שַׁלַּח (let go, send away).

games.raw: Chant Along, Prophetic Formula Highlight, Binyan Builder (Qal vs Piel of sh-l-ch), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes koh amar YHVH as the prophetic messenger formula.

lessons.title: Who Is the LORD

verse.hebrew: מִי יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר אֶשְׁמַע בְּקֹלוֹ
verse.translit: mi YHVH asher eshma be-kolo

lessons.gloss: Who is the LORD that I should listen to his voice?
lessons.focus: Introduce the interrogative מִי (who). Introduce the idiom שמע בקול (listen to the voice of, i.e. obey).

games.raw: Chant Along, Question Word Tap, Idiom Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child asks a mi-question in Hebrew.

lessons.title: I Will Harden Pharaoh's Heart

verse.hebrew: וַאֲנִי אַקְשֶׁה אֶת־לֵב פַּרְעֹה
verse.translit: va-ani akshe et-lev Par'oh

lessons.gloss: And I will harden Pharaoh's heart.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil akshe (I will harden) from ק־שׁ־ה. Introduce לֵב (heart), a central biblical-Hebrew word.

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder (Qal vs Hiphil), Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child forms Hiphil of ק־שׁ־ה.

lessons.title: The Rod Became a Serpent

verse.hebrew: וַיַּשְׁלֵךְ אַהֲרֹן אֶת־מַטֵּהוּ לִפְנֵי פַרְעֹה וְלִפְנֵי עֲבָדָיו וַיְהִי לְתַנִּין
verse.translit: va-yashlech Aharon et-matehu lifnei Par'oh ve-lifnei avadav va-yehi le-tanin

lessons.gloss: And Aaron cast his rod before Pharaoh and before his servants, and it became a serpent.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil va-yashlech (he cast). Introduce תַּנִּין (sea-monster, serpent).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child forms Hiphil of ש־ל־כ.

lessons.title: The Waters Became Blood

verse.hebrew: וַיֵּהָפְכוּ כָּל־הַמַּיִם אֲשֶׁר בַּיְאֹר לְדָם
verse.translit: va-yehafchu kol-ha-mayim asher ba-ye'or le-dam

lessons.gloss: And all the waters which were in the river were turned to blood.
lessons.focus: Introduce ה־פ־כ (to turn, overturn) in Niphal. Introduce דָּם (blood).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes the Niphal passive prefix pattern.

lessons.title: Pharaoh's Heart Was Hard

verse.hebrew: וַיֶּחֱזַק לֵב פַּרְעֹה וְלֹא שָׁמַע אֲלֵהֶם
verse.translit: va-yechezak lev Par'oh ve-lo shama alehem

lessons.gloss: And Pharaoh's heart was strong, and he did not listen to them.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ח־ז־ק. Contrast with Journey 2 lesson 56 (Israel strengthened himself in Hithpael) vs Qal here (was strong).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder (Qal vs Hithpael), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child distinguishes Qal from Hithpael of ח־ז־ק.

lessons.title: I Know the LORD

verse.hebrew: לְמַעַן תֵּדַע כִּי־אֵין כַּיהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ
verse.translit: lema'an teda ki-ein ka-YHVH Eloheinu

lessons.gloss: That you may know that there is none like the LORD our God.
lessons.focus: Introduce the purpose clause לְמַעַן (in order that). Introduce the comparative כְּ plus divine name. Introduce Eloheinu (our God) with 1cp suffix.

games.raw: Chant Along, Purpose Clause Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child builds a simple purpose clause with lema'an.

lessons.title: Not a Dog Shall Move His Tongue

verse.hebrew: וּלְכֹל בְּנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל לֹא יֶחֱרַץ־כֶּלֶב לְשֹׁנוֹ
verse.translit: u-le-chol bnei Yisrael lo yecheratz-kelev leshono

lessons.gloss: But against all the children of Israel not a dog shall move his tongue.
lessons.focus: Introduce ח־ר־צ (to move, sharpen). Introduce כֶּלֶב (dog). A vivid idiom of absolute quiet.

games.raw: Chant Along, Idiom Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 7 aloud.

lessons.title: This Month Shall Be to You

verse.hebrew: הַחֹדֶשׁ הַזֶּה לָכֶם רֹאשׁ חֳדָשִׁים רִאשׁוֹן הוּא לָכֶם לְחָדְשֵׁי הַשָּׁנָה
verse.translit: ha-chodesh ha-zeh lachem rosh chodashim rishon hu lachem le-chodshei ha-shana

lessons.gloss: This month shall be to you the head of months, the first it shall be to you of the months of the year.
lessons.focus: Introduce חֹדֶשׁ (new moon, month). Introduce the calendar vocabulary.

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 2 aloud and identifies rosh chodashim.

lessons.title: Take a Lamb

verse.hebrew: בֶּעָשֹׂר לַחֹדֶשׁ הַזֶּה וְיִקְחוּ לָהֶם אִישׁ שֶׂה לְבֵית־אָבֹת שֶׂה לַבָּיִת
verse.translit: be-asor la-chodesh ha-zeh ve-yikchu lahem ish seh le-veit-avot seh la-bayit

lessons.gloss: On the tenth of this month, and they shall take for themselves, each man a lamb for the house of fathers, a lamb for the house.
lessons.focus: Introduce the ordinal construct be-asor (on the tenth). Reinforce ל־ק־ח.

games.raw: Chant Along, Ordinal Tap, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 3 with minimal support.

lessons.title: The Blood for a Sign

verse.hebrew: וְהָיָה הַדָּם לָכֶם לְאֹת עַל הַבָּתִּים אֲשֶׁר אַתֶּם שָׁם וְרָאִיתִי אֶת־הַדָּם וּפָסַחְתִּי עֲלֵכֶם
verse.translit: ve-haya ha-dam lachem le-ot al ha-batim asher atem sham ve-ra'iti et-ha-dam u-fasachti aleichem

lessons.gloss: And the blood shall be to you for a sign upon the houses where you are, and I will see the blood and pass over you.
lessons.focus: Introduce פ־ס־ח (to pass over), the etymological root of Pesach. Reinforce the sign-of-covenant vocabulary (ot).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Covenant Vocabulary Review (ot), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child explains the pun between Pesach and the verb "to pass over."

lessons.title: A Memorial Forever

verse.hebrew: וְהָיָה הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה לָכֶם לְזִכָּרוֹן וְחַגֹּתֶם אֹתוֹ חַג לַיהוָה
verse.translit: ve-haya ha-yom ha-zeh lachem le-zikaron ve-chagotem oto chag la-YHVH

lessons.gloss: And this day shall be to you for a memorial, and you shall celebrate it as a festival to the LORD.
lessons.focus: Introduce זִכָּרוֹן (memorial) from ז־כ־ר. Introduce חַג (festival, pilgrimage feast).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recognizes the z-k-r root in zikaron and connects it to Journey 3 lesson 7.

lessons.title: Hear, O Israel

verse.hebrew: וְהָיָה כִּי־יֹאמְרוּ אֲלֵיכֶם בְּנֵיכֶם מָה הָעֲבֹדָה הַזֹּאת לָכֶם
verse.translit: ve-haya ki-yomru aleichem bneichem ma ha-avoda ha-zot lachem

lessons.gloss: And when your children say to you, What is this service to you?
lessons.focus: Introduce עֲבוֹדָה (service, worship) from ע־ב־ד. Establishes the Paschal catechism pattern that frames Jewish seder tradition.

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse aloud with minimal support.

lessons.title: With a Strong Hand

verse.hebrew: זָכוֹר אֶת־הַיּוֹם הַזֶּה אֲשֶׁר יְצָאתֶם מִמִּצְרָיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים כִּי בְּחֹזֶק יָד הוֹצִיא יְהוָה אֶתְכֶם מִזֶּה
verse.translit: zachor et-ha-yom ha-zeh asher yetzatem mi-Mitzrayim mi-beit avadim ki be-chozek yad hotzi YHVH etchem mi-zeh

lessons.gloss: Remember this day on which you came out from Egypt, from the house of slaves, for by strength of hand the LORD brought you out from this.
lessons.focus: Introduce the infinitive absolute as imperative (zachor, remember!). Introduce the Hiphil hotzi (he brought out) from י־צ־א. Introduce the construct beit avadim (house of slaves).

games.raw: Chant Along, Imperative Builder, Binyan Builder (Qal vs Hiphil of y-tz-a), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child distinguishes yatza (he went out) from hotzi (he brought out).

lessons.title: Sanctify to Me Every Firstborn

verse.hebrew: קַדֶּשׁ־לִי כָל־בְּכוֹר
verse.translit: kadesh-li kol-bchor

lessons.gloss: Sanctify to me every firstborn.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Piel imperative kadesh (sanctify). Introduce בְּכוֹר (firstborn).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder (Qal vs Piel of k-d-sh), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 2 from memory.

lessons.title: They Went Up Armed

verse.hebrew: וַחֲמֻשִׁים עָלוּ בְנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵל מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרָיִם
verse.translit: va-chamushim alu bnei-Yisrael me-eretz Mitzrayim

lessons.gloss: And the children of Israel went up armed from the land of Egypt.
lessons.focus: Introduce חֲמֻשִׁים (armed, arrayed in fives, passive participle). Reinforce ע־ל־ה.

roots.raw: ח־מ־שׁ (to be ordered in fives / armed).

games.raw: Chant Along, Passive Participle Match, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 18.

lessons.title: The LORD Will Fight for You

verse.hebrew: יְהוָה יִלָּחֵם לָכֶם וְאַתֶּם תַּחֲרִישׁוּן
verse.translit: YHVH yilachem lachem ve-atem tacharishun

lessons.gloss: The LORD will fight for you, and you shall keep silent.
lessons.focus: Introduce ל־ח־מ (to fight) in Niphal. Introduce ח־ר־שׁ (to be silent) in Hiphil.

roots.raw: ל־ח־מ (to fight), ח־ר־שׁ (to be silent, plow).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 14 from memory.

lessons.title: Lift Up Your Rod

verse.hebrew: וְאַתָּה הָרֵם אֶת־מַטְּךָ וּנְטֵה אֶת־יָדְךָ עַל־הַיָּם וּבְקָעֵהוּ
verse.translit: ve-ata harem et-matcha u-neteh et-yadcha al-ha-yam u-veka'ehu

lessons.gloss: And you, lift up your rod and stretch out your hand over the sea and divide it.
lessons.focus: Introduce ר־ו־מ (to be high, Hiphil to lift up) and ב־ק־ע (to split, divide). Chains of Hiphil imperatives.

roots.raw: ר־ו־מ (to be high, lift up), ב־ק־ע (to split).

games.raw: Chant Along, Imperative Chain Builder, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child chains multiple imperatives in Hebrew.

lessons.title: The Sea Returned

verse.hebrew: וַיָּשָׁב הַיָּם לִפְנוֹת בֹּקֶר לְאֵיתָנוֹ
verse.translit: va-yashov ha-yam lifnot boker le-eitano

lessons.gloss: And the sea returned to its strength at the turning of morning.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ש־ו־ב from Journey 1 lesson 30. Introduce אֵיתָן (strong flowing, permanence).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 27 aloud.

lessons.title: I Will Sing to the LORD

verse.hebrew: אָשִׁירָה לַיהוָה כִּי־גָאֹה גָּאָה
verse.translit: ashira la-YHVH ki-ga'oh ga'a

lessons.gloss: I will sing to the LORD, for he has triumphed gloriously.
lessons.focus: Introduce the cohortative אָשִׁירָה (let me sing). Introduce ש־י־ר (to sing). Introduce the emphatic ga'oh ga'a (surely triumphed). This is the first poetic verse of the course.

roots.raw: ש־י־ר (to sing), ג־א־ה (to be high, triumph).

games.raw: Chant Along, Cohortative Highlight, Shoresh Sort, Memorization Reward (this is a famous singing verse).

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 1 in a singing voice.

lessons.title: My Strength and My Song

verse.hebrew: עָזִּי וְזִמְרָת יָהּ וַיְהִי־לִי לִישׁוּעָה
verse.translit: ozi ve-zimrat Yah va-yehi-li li-yeshua

lessons.gloss: The LORD is my strength and my song, and he has become my salvation.
lessons.focus: Introduce the short divine name יָהּ. Introduce י־ש־ע (to save) and the noun יְשׁוּעָה (salvation).

roots.raw: ע־ז־ז (to be strong), ז־מ־ר (to sing, praise), י־ש־ע (to save).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Divine Name Variations Highlight, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child explains that Yah is the short form of YHVH and identifies yeshua as salvation.

lessons.title: Who Is Like Thee

verse.hebrew: מִי־כָמֹכָה בָּאֵלִם יְהוָה מִי כָּמֹכָה נֶאְדָּר בַּקֹּדֶשׁ
verse.translit: mi-chamocha ba-elim YHVH mi kamocha nedar ba-kodesh

lessons.gloss: Who is like you among the gods, O LORD, who is like you, majestic in holiness?
lessons.focus: Introduce the comparative idiom mi-chamocha (who is like you). Introduce the Niphal participle נֶאְדָּר (majestic, from א־ד־ר).

games.raw: Chant Along, Comparative Idiom Highlight, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites mi-chamocha, the famous phrase used in Jewish liturgy.

lessons.title: The LORD Reigns Forever

verse.hebrew: יְהוָה יִמְלֹךְ לְעֹלָם וָעֶד
verse.translit: YHVH yimloch le-olam va-ed

lessons.gloss: The LORD shall reign forever and ever.
lessons.focus: Introduce מ־ל־כ (to reign, related to melech). Introduce עַד (forever, unto) in the compound le-olam va-ed.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 18 from memory.

lessons.title: The Waters Were Made Sweet

verse.hebrew: וַיּוֹרֵהוּ יְהוָה עֵץ וַיַּשְׁלֵךְ אֶל־הַמַּיִם וַיִּמְתְּקוּ הַמָּיִם
verse.translit: va-yorehu YHVH etz va-yashlech el-ha-mayim va-yimteku ha-mayim

lessons.gloss: And the LORD showed him a tree, and he cast it into the waters, and the waters were made sweet.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil va-yorehu (he showed him) from י־ר־ה (to throw, teach). Note for parent companion: this root is the source of Torah (teaching).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (y-r-h and its noun Torah), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child connects the root y-r-h to the noun Torah.

lessons.title: On Eagles' Wings

verse.hebrew: אַתֶּם רְאִיתֶם אֲשֶׁר עָשִׂיתִי לְמִצְרָיִם וָאֶשָּׂא אֶתְכֶם עַל־כַּנְפֵי נְשָׁרִים
verse.translit: atem re'item asher asiti le-Mitzrayim va-esa etchem al-kanfei nesharim

lessons.gloss: You have seen what I did to Egypt, and I carried you on eagles' wings.
lessons.focus: Reinforce נ־שׂ־א in 1cs with object suffix. Introduce כָּנָף (wing) and נֶשֶׁר (eagle).

games.raw: Chant Along, Verse Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites the eagles' wings verse.

lessons.title: A Kingdom of Priests

verse.hebrew: וְאַתֶּם תִּהְיוּ־לִי מַמְלֶכֶת כֹּהֲנִים וְגוֹי קָדוֹשׁ
verse.translit: ve-atem tihyu-li mamlechet kohanim ve-goi kadosh

lessons.gloss: And you shall be to me a kingdom of priests and a holy nation.
lessons.focus: Introduce כֹּהֵן (priest) and the construct mamlechet kohanim. Reinforce קָדוֹשׁ (holy, from ק־ד־שׁ).

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites verse 6, a covenant identity-formula.

lessons.title: The LORD Came Down on Sinai

verse.hebrew: וְהַר סִינַי עָשַׁן כֻּלּוֹ מִפְּנֵי אֲשֶׁר יָרַד עָלָיו יְהוָה בָּאֵשׁ
verse.translit: ve-har Sinai ashan kulo mipnei asher yarad alav YHVH ba-esh

lessons.gloss: And Mount Sinai was entirely in smoke, because the LORD had come down on it in fire.
lessons.focus: Introduce י־ר־ד (to go down). Introduce עָשָׁן (smoke).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort (opposite of ע־ל־ה), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child distinguishes yarad (he went down) from ala (he went up).

lessons.title: I Am the LORD Thy God

verse.hebrew: אָנֹכִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר הוֹצֵאתִיךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים
verse.translit: anochi YHVH Elohecha asher hotzetikha me-eretz Mitzrayim mi-beit avadim

lessons.gloss: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out from the land of Egypt, from the house of slaves.
lessons.focus: The Decalogue opens. Reinforce the Hiphil perfect with 2ms suffix (hotzetikha, I brought you out). A weighty covenant-preamble verse.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites the Decalogue preamble from memory.

lessons.title: No Other Gods

verse.hebrew: לֹא־יִהְיֶה לְךָ אֱלֹהִים אֲחֵרִים עַל־פָּנָי
verse.translit: lo-yihyeh lecha Elohim acherim al-panai

lessons.gloss: You shall have no other gods before me.
lessons.focus: First commandment. Introduce אַחֵר (other) in masculine plural.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites the first commandment.

lessons.title: Remember the Sabbath

verse.hebrew: זָכוֹר אֶת־יוֹם הַשַּׁבָּת לְקַדְּשׁוֹ
verse.translit: zachor et-yom ha-shabat le-kadsho

lessons.gloss: Remember the Sabbath day to sanctify it.
lessons.focus: Fourth commandment. Reinforce zachor (infinitive absolute imperative). Reinforce the Piel infinitive with suffix le-kadsho.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites the Sabbath commandment.

lessons.title: Honor Thy Father and Mother

verse.hebrew: כַּבֵּד אֶת־אָבִיךָ וְאֶת־אִמֶּךָ
verse.translit: kabed et-avicha ve-et-imecha

lessons.gloss: Honor your father and your mother.
lessons.focus: Fifth commandment. Introduce אֵם (mother). Reinforce the Piel imperative kabed.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites the fifth commandment.

lessons.title: The Prohibitions

verse.hebrew: לֹא תִרְצָח לֹא תִנְאָף לֹא תִגְנֹב לֹא־תַעֲנֶה בְרֵעֲךָ עֵד שָׁקֶר
verse.translit: lo tirtzach lo tin'af lo tignov lo-ta'aneh ve-re'acha ed shaker

lessons.gloss: You shall not murder, you shall not commit adultery, you shall not steal, you shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.
lessons.focus: Introduce the 2ms imperfect as negative commandment. Introduce ר־צ־ח (to murder), נ־א־פ (to commit adultery), ג־נ־ב (to steal). Introduce רֵעַ (neighbor).

games.raw: Chant Along, Negative Command Builder, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites the prohibition commandments in order.

lessons.title: Make Us Gods

verse.hebrew: וַיֹּאמְרוּ אֵלָיו קוּם עֲשֵׂה־לָנוּ אֱלֹהִים
verse.translit: va-yomru elav kum aseh-lanu Elohim

lessons.gloss: And they said to him, Rise, make for us gods.
lessons.focus: Reinforce the imperative chain kum plus aseh. Introduce the plural "gods" usage of elohim.

games.raw: Chant Along, Imperative Chain Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child chains imperatives.

lessons.title: A Stiff-Necked People

verse.hebrew: רָאִיתִי אֶת־הָעָם הַזֶּה וְהִנֵּה עַם־קְשֵׁה־עֹרֶף הוּא
verse.translit: ra'iti et-ha-am ha-zeh ve-hineh am-kshe-oref hu

lessons.gloss: I have seen this people, and behold, it is a stiff-necked people.
lessons.focus: Introduce the construct am-kshe-oref (people stiff of neck). Introduce עֹרֶף (neck).

games.raw: Chant Along, Construct Chain Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads the stiff-necked idiom.

lessons.title: Turn from Thy Wrath

verse.hebrew: שׁוּב מֵחֲרוֹן אַפֶּךָ וְהִנָּחֵם עַל־הָרָעָה לְעַמֶּךָ
verse.translit: shuv me-charon apecha ve-hinachem al-ha-ra'a le-amecha

lessons.gloss: Turn from your burning anger and relent from the evil against your people.
lessons.focus: Reinforce ש־ו־ב as imperative. Introduce the Niphal imperative hinachem (relent, from נ־ח־מ).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 12 with minimal support.

lessons.title: Show Me Thy Glory

verse.hebrew: וַיֹּאמַר הַרְאֵנִי נָא אֶת־כְּבֹדֶךָ
verse.translit: va-yomar har'eni na et-kvodecha

lessons.gloss: And he said, Please show me your glory.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Hiphil imperative with 1cs suffix har'eni (show me). Introduce כָּבוֹד (glory).

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child forms Hiphil imperative with object suffix.

lessons.title: The LORD Passed Before Him

verse.hebrew: וַיַּעֲבֹר יְהוָה עַל־פָּנָיו וַיִּקְרָא יְהוָה יְהוָה אֵל רַחוּם וְחַנּוּן
verse.translit: va-ya'avor YHVH al-panav va-yikra YHVH YHVH El rachum ve-chanun

lessons.gloss: And the LORD passed before him and proclaimed, The LORD, the LORD, God merciful and gracious.
lessons.focus: The thirteen attributes begin. Introduce ע־ב־ר (to pass over). Introduce רַחוּם (merciful, from ר־ח־מ) and חַנּוּן (gracious, from ח־נ־נ). These two adjectives are central to the covenant character of God.

roots.raw: ע־ב־ר (to pass over), ר־ח־מ (to have mercy), ח־נ־נ (to be gracious).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Attribute Highlight (these two adjectives glow and connect to chesed in next lesson).

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 6 and names rachum and chanun as covenant attributes.

lessons.title: Slow to Anger, Abundant in Chesed

verse.hebrew: אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וְרַב־חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת
verse.translit: erech apayim ve-rav-chesed ve-emet

lessons.gloss: Slow to anger and abundant in chesed and truth.
lessons.focus: Introduce the covenant-foundational חֶסֶד (covenant loyalty, loving-kindness). This is the single most theologically weighty noun in all the Standard Works for Chris's framework, as memory notes indicate. Also introduce אֱמֶת (truth, faithfulness) from א־מ־נ.

vocab.raw: חֶסֶד (chesed, covenant loyalty), אֱמֶת (truth), אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם (slow to anger, long-of-nose).

games.raw: Chant Along, Chesed Highlight (this word glows with special treatment; parent material explains the convergent validation framework and that chesed will reappear in every Journey from here on), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites rav-chesed and names chesed as covenant loyalty.

lessons.title: Keeping Chesed for Thousands

verse.hebrew: נֹצֵר חֶסֶד לָאֲלָפִים נֹשֵׂא עָוֹן וָפֶשַׁע וְחַטָּאָה
verse.translit: notzer chesed la-alafim nose avon va-fesha ve-chata'a

lessons.gloss: Keeping chesed for thousands, bearing iniquity and transgression and sin.
lessons.focus: Introduce נ־צ־ר (to keep, guard, similar to sh-m-r). Introduce עָוֹן (iniquity), פֶּשַׁע (transgression), חַטָּאָה (sin). Three sin-words.

games.raw: Chant Along, Sin-Vocabulary Sort (three shades of wrongdoing), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child distinguishes the three sin-words and names chesed as what God keeps for thousands.

lessons.title: Moses' Face Shone

verse.hebrew: וּמֹשֶׁה לֹא־יָדַע כִּי קָרַן עוֹר פָּנָיו
verse.translit: u-Moshe lo-yada ki karan or panav

lessons.gloss: And Moses did not know that the skin of his face shone.
lessons.focus: Introduce ק־ר־נ (to shine, to have horns, the verb famously mistranslated). Introduce עוֹר (skin).

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Translation History Note (parent companion explains the Vulgate's "horns" error), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 29 and explains the double meaning of k-r-n.

lessons.title: The Priestly Blessing: The LORD Bless Thee

verse.hebrew: יְבָרֶכְךָ יְהוָה וְיִשְׁמְרֶךָ
verse.translit: yevarechecha YHVH ve-yishmerecha

lessons.gloss: The LORD bless you and keep you.
lessons.focus: First line of the priestly blessing. Reinforce ב־ר־ך and ש־מ־ר with 2ms suffix. A liturgical text spoken in Jewish and LDS contexts weekly.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child recites the first line of the priestly blessing.

lessons.title: The LORD Make His Face Shine

verse.hebrew: יָאֵר יְהוָה פָּנָיו אֵלֶיךָ וִיחֻנֶּךָּ
verse.translit: ya'er YHVH panav elecha vi-chuneka

lessons.gloss: The LORD make his face shine upon you and be gracious to you.
lessons.focus: Second line. Introduce the Hiphil ya'er (cause-to-shine, from א־ו־ר). Reinforce ח־נ־נ with 2ms suffix.

games.raw: Chant Along, Binyan Builder, Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites the second line of the priestly blessing.

lessons.title: The LORD Lift Up His Countenance

verse.hebrew: יִשָּׂא יְהוָה פָּנָיו אֵלֶיךָ וְיָשֵׂם לְךָ שָׁלוֹם
verse.translit: yisa YHVH panav elecha ve-yasem lecha shalom

lessons.gloss: The LORD lift up his face upon you and give you peace.
lessons.focus: Third line. Reinforce נ־שׂ־א and ש־י־מ. Introduce שָׁלוֹם (peace, wholeness). The priestly blessing complete.

games.raw: Chant Along, Memorization Reward, Full Priestly Blessing Recitation.

lessons.exit: Child recites the full three-line priestly blessing from memory.

lessons.title: Make a Fiery Serpent

verse.hebrew: עֲשֵׂה לְךָ שָׂרָף וְשִׂים אֹתוֹ עַל־נֵס
verse.translit: aseh lecha saraf ve-sim oto al-nes

lessons.gloss: Make yourself a fiery serpent and set it on a pole.
lessons.focus: Introduce שָׂרָף (seraph, fiery serpent) and נֵס (banner, pole, sign). For LDS families: parent companion flags the typological reading (brazen serpent as type of Christ, invoked in Helaman 8:14-15 and John 3:14).

games.raw: Chant Along, Typology Note (parent material), Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 8 aloud.

lessons.title: Everyone Who Looks

verse.hebrew: כָּל־הַנָּשׁוּךְ וְרָאָה אֹתוֹ וָחָי
verse.translit: kol-ha-nashuch ve-ra'a oto va-chai

lessons.gloss: Everyone who is bitten and looks upon it shall live.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Qal passive participle נָשׁוּךְ (bitten, from נ־שׁ־כ). Reinforce ר־א־ה, ח־י־ה.

games.raw: Chant Along, Participle Match, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 9 with minimal support.

lessons.title: Hear, O Israel

verse.hebrew: שְׁמַע יִשְׂרָאֵל יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ יְהוָה אֶחָד
verse.translit: shema Yisrael YHVH Eloheinu YHVH echad

lessons.gloss: Hear, O Israel, the LORD our God, the LORD is one.
lessons.focus: The Shema. The single most recited verse in all Jewish liturgy. Every word is familiar to the child by this point, which is by design. The reading is a quiet, weighty moment.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shema-specific melody (traditional), Memorization Reward, Reverent Presentation.

lessons.exit: Child recites the Shema from memory with reverent tone.

lessons.title: You Shall Love the LORD

verse.hebrew: וְאָהַבְתָּ אֵת יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשְׁךָ וּבְכָל־מְאֹדֶךָ
verse.translit: ve-ahavta et YHVH Elohecha be-chol-levavcha u-ve-chol-nafshecha u-ve-chol-me'odecha

lessons.gloss: And you shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your might.
lessons.focus: The V'ahavta. Introduce לֵבָב (heart, extended form of lev). Introduce מְאֹד as noun (might, muchness). The triad of heart, soul, might.

games.raw: Chant Along, Triad Highlight (heart, soul, might glow together), Memorization Reward.

lessons.exit: Child recites the V'ahavta from memory.

lessons.title: These Words on Thy Heart

verse.hebrew: וְהָיוּ הַדְּבָרִים הָאֵלֶּה אֲשֶׁר אָנֹכִי מְצַוְּךָ הַיּוֹם עַל־לְבָבֶךָ
verse.translit: ve-hayu ha-devarim ha-eleh asher anochi metzavcha ha-yom al-levavecha

lessons.gloss: And these words which I command you today shall be on your heart.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Piel participle with 2ms suffix metzavcha (commanding you). Introduce צ־ו־ה (to command), the root of mitzvah.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child identifies the root ts-v-h and connects it to the noun mitzvah.

lessons.title: Teach Them to Thy Children

verse.hebrew: וְשִׁנַּנְתָּם לְבָנֶיךָ וְדִבַּרְתָּ בָּם
verse.translit: ve-shinantam le-vanecha ve-dibarta bam

lessons.gloss: And you shall teach them diligently to your children and speak of them.
lessons.focus: Introduce the Piel shinen (to teach diligently, repeat, sharpen). Reinforce ד־ב־ר.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 7.

lessons.title: When You Sit and When You Walk

verse.hebrew: בְּשִׁבְתְּךָ בְּבֵיתֶךָ וּבְלֶכְתְּךָ בַדֶּרֶךְ וּבְשָׁכְבְּךָ וּבְקוּמֶךָ
verse.translit: be-shivtecha be-veitecha u-ve-lechtecha va-derech u-ve-shochbecha u-ve-kumecha

lessons.gloss: When you sit in your house and when you walk by the way and when you lie down and when you rise.
lessons.focus: Introduce infinitives construct with 2ms suffix for all four activities. Introduce ש־כ־ב (to lie down). Reinforce the everyday life framework of covenant teaching.

games.raw: Chant Along, Infinitive Plus Suffix Builder, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 7b and lists the four activities in Hebrew.

lessons.title: Bind Them as a Sign

verse.hebrew: וּקְשַׁרְתָּם לְאוֹת עַל־יָדֶךָ וְהָיוּ לְטֹטָפֹת בֵּין עֵינֶיךָ
verse.translit: u-kshartam le-ot al-yadecha ve-hayu le-totafot bein einecha

lessons.gloss: And you shall bind them as a sign on your hand, and they shall be as frontlets between your eyes.
lessons.focus: Introduce ק־שׁ־ר (to bind). Introduce the word טוֹטָפוֹת (frontlets), the biblical source of tefillin.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 8.

lessons.title: Write Them on the Doorposts

verse.hebrew: וּכְתַבְתָּם עַל־מְזֻזוֹת בֵּיתֶךָ וּבִשְׁעָרֶיךָ
verse.translit: u-chetavtam al-mezuzot beitecha u-vish'arecha

lessons.gloss: And you shall write them on the doorposts of your house and on your gates.
lessons.focus: Introduce כ־ת־ב (to write) in 2ms perfect with vav-consecutive. Introduce מְזוּזָה (doorpost) and שַׁעַר (gate). The source of the mezuzah.

games.raw: Chant Along, Shoresh Sort, Verse Builder.

lessons.exit: Child reads verse 9 and identifies the root k-t-v.

lessons.title: Consolidation Before Exit

verse.ref: Full reading of Deuteronomy 6:4-9 (the Shema and V'ahavta)

lessons.gloss: Consolidation lesson before Journey 3 exit. The child reads Deuteronomy 6:4-9 in full aloud, applying all the pointing and unpointed reading they have learned.
lessons.focus: No new content. Consolidation and rehearsal.

games.raw: Scroll Reader (unassisted), Memorization Showcase, Chant Along.

lessons.exit: Child reads Deut 6:4-9 aloud smoothly and recites it from memory.

lessons.title: Journey 3 Exit: Exodus 14 and the Shema

verse.ref: Exodus 14:13-31 and Deuteronomy 6:4-9 read aloud in full

lessons.gloss: Journey 3 exit. The child reads Exodus 14:13-31 (the crossing of the Red Sea narrative) and the Shema passage aloud in full, unassisted. This is the largest reading yet undertaken.
lessons.focus: All Journey 1 through 3 grammar and vocabulary consolidated. No new content.

games.raw: Final Scroll Reader, Memorization Showcase, Parent Submission Flow.

lessons.exit: Child submits recording of Exodus 14:13-31 and Deut 6:4-9. Parent approves. Journey 3 complete. Journey 4 (Lehi's Family) unlocks.
